title: A Brief History of the Street Lamp

turns.utterance: Old street lamps and their history, I keep going back and forth on it, what would you do?
It really is. A cozy, surprising bit of history that readers love.
A handful my way and I'll carry it from there, though any tip on choosing would help.

slots.query: history of street lamps, accessible angle

turns.utterance: Four ideas: 1) The arc from oil to gas to electric 2) The lamplighter's daily round 3) The first night a city glowed 4) How lamps made cities safer after dark.
They're all lovely and I can't choose, so your strongest one sketched out? Is the newsletter still going out Friday?
turns.note: P3 defers the choice to the agent; agent selects an idea and proceeds to outline.

source.post: A Brief History of the Street Lamp

turns.utterance: The Friday newsletter is still scheduled. I went with the oil-to-electric arc. Outline: 1) Lighting the night with oil 2) The gas-lamp era 3) The electric revolution 4) The world the lamps left us.
Brilliant, thank you. I can take it from here.
